params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your first main phase, you may pay {B}. If you do, transform NICKNAME.

params.Description: Creature spells you cast have convoke. (Your creatures can help cast those spells. Each creature you tap while casting a creature spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.)

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your first main phase, you may pay {W}. If you do, transform NICKNAME.

params.Description: Each other nontoken creature you control has persist. (When it dies, if it had no -1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it.)
